channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: What made you still hold BTC? — 94 replies — 376.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
What made you still hold BTC?

Open thread • Replies: 94 • Updated: 2026-06-21 16:18 UTC

OP

Bitcoin has gone through multiple cycles, crashes, and endless criticism, yet many continue to hold. What keeps your conviction strong after all these years?

Early replies (first 3)

62371733
>>62371718
>What keeps your conviction strong after all these years?

62371807
The only reason to ever sell bitcoin is to buy more at a lower price.

62371917
>>62371807
correct
>waiting for a good entry

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62384208
Where is satoshi?

62384223
>>62377200
It's all about hype and doesnt have any value

62384235
>>62372468
You better trade memecoins for that

62385618
>>62384235
Go for it. Nobody's stopping you, anon

62386979
>>62384208
Nobody knows

62387122
>>62384166
Do you think it will attract a lot of interest in the long run? The model looks good, and since it's self-custodial while expanding Bitcoin's use cases, I don't think it raises the usual concerns that many people have with DeFi.

62387125
>>62383619
Anon is relaxing

62387534
>>62387122
We'll know for sure once TBV launches on mainnet. That's when we'll see if it gains adoption and makes a real impact.

62387549
>>62383732
If you buy memecoins, not $btc

62387563
>>62387534
Defi is no longer valuable

62387566
Im fine

62387833
>>62387563
Depends what you mean by valuable. A lot of the hype is gone, but people are still borrowing, lending, and farming yield.

62387836
>>62387549
Doge coins lol

62387875
>>62371718
Because it's the only crypto asset I'd be comfortable holding for the next decade without constantly checking the chart.

62387892
the longer this market exists, the more Bitcoin seems to become the benchmark everything else gets compared against. So very very bullish

62388642
>>62387875
100%

62388704
>>62371718
Institutions are starting to make it into BTC, before bridge was the issue but with TBV eliminating that, more money will start flowing into BTC, it still feels early.

62388780
>>62376610
> printing is the only thing keeping the bubble from popping instantly. you want that?

62388819
>>62377444
> nothing has changed except the price chart and your cope levels

62388854
nothing, im not retarded so i take profits. my cost basis is negative now.

62389149
>>62388780
You know my answer for that

62389340
I feel like something new has to happen before the market shifts sentiment.

All the ETFs and government regulation just hurt the project.
Nobody is utilizing the tools, the tools still feel beta, and developers are being arrested.

If it's just going to be a big gay digital rock the momentum grinds to a halt.

The problem is some of us got rich and have something to lose now.
Different factions formed inside the developer community.
Is there incentive to free ball the network still? idk.

I'm still holding but this bear feels different

62390164
>>62388819
So how will you change it?

62391118
>>62389340
I'm still holding as well.

62391156
>>62371718
It feels like shit when it goes down but when you're near the bottom like now you just remember the last times you felt this way and how it gongo up from here, everytime. Bobos are ngmi. Mumu supremacy is real. Cope trannies.

62391165
>>62383619
Based retard

62391192
>>62371718
The 20% long-term-capital-gains tax rate that I'd have to pay if I cashed out all at once.

62391471
The only investments I hold are schizo nonsense Chainlink and PMs. I have a good amount of money through my Roth and 401k. I can only invest in specific etfs through my work 401k. What’s the best method to get long term Bitcoin exposure through a IRA?

62392524
>>62391156
You're not a real investor

62393205
>>62372380
Then how come I can send BTC to my Bitcoin core wallet dumbfuck?

item.title: >boss put me on a PIP 2 months ago >been trying to find jobs a few months before that cuz I realized there was no pleasi… — 99 replies — 239.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
>boss put me on a PIP 2 months ago >been trying to find jobs a few months before that cuz I realized there was no pleasi…

Open thread • Replies: 99 • Updated: 2026-06-21 16:01 UTC

OP

>boss put me on a PIP 2 months ago
>been trying to find jobs a few months before that cuz I realized there was no pleasing him
>haven't found any jobs, its unreal how bad the market is, have this bad feeling its never going to get better
>PIP ends on Tuesday
I am an engineer. I started off as a tech and worked my ass off getting bachelors full time to escape manual labor. Now im gonna be that goy with a masters degree who took a 500 percent pay cut to do repetitive ligament destroying work. I honestly feel like god did this beacuse its too much bad things happening at once that are culminating into my total demise.

Early replies (first 3)

62388691
>>62388676
>500 percent pay cut to do repetitive ligament destroying work
Trades pay more than ever, especially vs pajeet-saturated office work. Skill issue

62388694
>>62388676
My entire life has been nothing but fighting tooth and nail, working myself 1000x harder than anyone anywhere ever for 0.001% of what anyone else gets for free. I have felt that god is purposely shitting on me pretty much my whole life. It doesn't get better, it only ever gets worse. If anything happens to me that seem to be a good thing, I have 6 months max to enjoy it because that'll be taken from me and then I'll be beaten up and crushed down for added effect. It's a real comedy out there.

So don't worry bro, you have a lot of time ahead of you to suffer far more. If there really is a god, he must be the most perfectly evil of entities.

62388697
The worst part is that in my meeting with my boss today he didnt mention if I will pass the PIP. He said he needed to talk with some people including HR. So 90 percent chance he is going to fire me but just enough chance he wont that I have to spend the weekend waiting instead of processing the pain. And if he doesnt fire me, I will be a totally buckbroken employee who will never care about a rasie and work 60 hours weeks. Like a absurd housewife that has no were else to go and she tries to esapce and gets rapped(applies to ghost jobs) even worse so she comes back to him. Thats me. I used to think my relationship with work was like between a man and a woman, were I am the man that picks and chooses women and is the one who leaves but its all turned around past couple of years. I am nothing but a side pieace female whore to these companies now, they treat me like a contract worker without paying me like one. They got us with not giving raises to match inflation, they got us with return to work mandates and now, they are going to get us by firing us and leaving us with nothing. U will get put on a PIP too, at the worst time possible also. They wont even lay u off anymore, they want to save a little bit of money by denying us unemployment insurance by firing us through a PIP.


Was being in ur 30s a good excperince back in the day? There is no way human civilization would have gotten to were it is if it was always this bad for everyone. Of course, I am a faggot and just suck but the fsct of the matter is that PIPs and no jobs has been a very common trope on the internet lately

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62389844
>>62389651
> job market isn’t as bad as you think
Yes it is
> use your network
Critical advice. Network has always been a good way to get into a company but at this point it’s the only way.
Which is why your first statement is wrong and dumb

62390141
>>62389431
>be grateful to Satan when I get..
waiting

62390194
>>62389362
Boomers are retarded, live through the easiest time and history and instead of passing it down they just piss it all away on useless shit. In my case, my mom was a horsegirl.

62390195
>>62389476
You clearly have never been anywhere near any tech related job lol

62390197
>>62389715
I recommended several ex-colleagues at a job I was involved in the hiring process for. They were literally perfect for the job and had all the qualifications and the boss agreed, but they only had 2-3 yoe instead of 5+ as the bossman wanted. They all found jobs a few weeks later because non-retarded hirers (rare but do exist) judge by competence and not years on the job. 9 months later still not a single hire, the only people who make it through his screen are literally incapable of programming and have never worked with the tech we're recruiting for before as they clearly and explicitly state during the interview. They all explain they applied to this position (a senior role, not a junior or intern role) to learn about this tech and while they all have 10-15-20 yoe in webdev, they are so incompetent they couldn't tie their metaphorical shoelaces.

62390239
>>62388694
God loves. Man Kills. The world is ruled by the wicked. Its up to us to be the change we want to see. Christ go with you and God bless you. Bear the torch of righteousness into the dark.

62390246
>>62389374
Oh yeah. Add in a Schizophrenic father and we got a winner.

62390249
>>62389431
lol, lmao

62390264
>>62390249
Looks like someone struck a nerve.

62390415
>>62389206
Most people get made redundant, I´ve had/have some pretty incompetent colleagues and even those haven´t gotten fired yet.

62390437
>>62388850
> he's already on one. that's the problem.

62390473
>>62389236
> sitting at a desk is worse for your health than welding fumes and busted knees

cope harder, deskcel

62390520
>>62389236
You're a retard. Skilled or not, trades will fuck up your body through accidents, overuse injury, and just general wear and tear. It's not an accident that many in the trades cope with alcohol and drugs.
t. Former electrician now office monkey

62390565
>>62388697
>they treat me like a contract worker without paying me like one.
Holy FUCK that's what I've felt too.

Some people are allowed to stay solid and secure because of their personal connections and the rest of us get bait and switched during the interviews, squeezed of what they can get out of us for a while, then tossed out when the knowledge transfer is done or the project is good enough for them to hand it to one of their buddies and take it from you. You get worked like a slave and then cast out. Chewed up and spit out.

62390573
>>62388795
>Just make sure they fire you so you can get unemployment.
I thought it was if you get fired you don't get unemployment.
I someone tried pip'ing me too but I was protected by a higher up who realized that politics was fucking my shit up with a hostile environment so he mercy killed me with a layoff so I got a nice severance. After that I also got unemployment for my state.

62390675
>>62388691
>NAH MAN MY DAD'S BOYFRIEND'S STEP DOG'S COUSIN'S BROTHER IS AN ELECTRICIAN AND HE MAKES $370K A YEAR WORKS 3 MONTHS EVERY OTHER YEAR DOING UNDERWATER DATA CENTER CONSTRUCTION IN ALASKA NO DEBT BTFO COLLAGE FAGS

62391179
>>62389426
Mmm yes, go to the meat grinder goym

62391366
>>62390565
And then all these boomer managers judging me in interviews telling me ive been bouncing around all over the place, its awful

62391513
>>62390249
>she still thinks satanists are in it for the edge alone
>thinking fascism is edgy, an authoritarian imposition of traditional morals

62391843
>>62389431
I'd welcome you to try, sukdeep dikshit. I'll break every bone in your body if you come at me with a saw. Have you ever even operated a saw?

62391855
>>62388729
>>62388736
Retards, mostly 2nd anon.

You get off of backbreaking shit after jman(4-6 years) and specialize. Or sales, or foreman, or estimators, or inspectors, or maint.

Low IQ stay in back breaking

62391907
>>62390573
No, you get unemployment only if you are laid off due to economic constraints or incompetence. Thats why PIPs aren’t that bad. You don’t get unemployment if you are fired for negligence (this can be fought if you have proof they set you up or if they were playing favorites) or if you leave willingly. Unemployment benefits tend to pay up to 2000 dollars a month depending on your salary.
>t. Corporate wagie who dealt with it before

62392212
>>62391843
And who might you be? How about you learn to speak only when spoken to.

62392253
>>62388711
>ah yes did i tell you? all women around me have fancy jobs with big salaries and 100% remote positions and company trips all over the world
the new system is in place permanently and working as intended

62392282
>>62388711
>but i refuse to do it because my gf would earn more than me
Yeah, that’s a very good reason. Never let a girl out earn you.
>t. retired at 25

62392283
>>62392253
> >ah yes did i tell you? all women around me have fancy jobs with big salaries and 100% remote positions and company trips all over the world
Doesn’t bother me. Retired at 25. I know how damaging a 9-5 is and how even waking up at 7am is shitty and terrible for your healthy. Going to bed with an alarm is terrible too. No girl is out earning me. Trust me.

62393076
>>62388802
>I see a nig or a nog here and there
Kek

62393091
>>62388992
Kys

I'm in a very comfy sport right now but most of my life has been a shitshow ripe with suffering. I'll be "grateful" when I'm dead. Until then it's hate, hate, hate and a lot of grit

62393160
>>62388730
May everyone you love die of cancer before your eyes.

62393171
>>62388761
Kys

item.title: WHAT THE HELL??? My dad owns dealership (he's rich) and is lowering my pay from $20k a month, to fucking $10k a month. I… — 18 replies — 72.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
WHAT THE HELL??? My dad owns dealership (he's rich) and is lowering my pay from $20k a month, to fucking $10k a month. I…

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-06-21 16:15 UTC

OP

WHAT THE HELL??? My dad owns dealership (he's rich) and is lowering my pay from $20k a month, to fucking $10k a month. I'm turning 30 in a few months and he's telling me I need to figure it out myself. Are you fucking KIDDING ME? Dude is fucking loaded. I drive the cars once every two weeks to charge up the batteries and get the fluids flowing, and it takes up my entire day. It's not easy. I even fill up the gas tanks with my own money. What the hell am I supposed to do? I will have to basically cut my life style in half at this point.

Early replies (first 3)

62392318
>>62392315
>I will have to basically cut my life style in half at this point.
What is your life style now OP? Describe a typical day.

62392320
Dude. Dad? Dealership.

62392332
>>62392315
>implying anyone from the car world would allow a son with the propensity to become a neet reach the age of legal majority at which they would become a neet without beating them to death long before this point

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62392333
>>62392320
kek

62392344
I wake up at around 1-2, check out whats going on on the internet. kinda zone out until 8pm and then drive the cars and go party at 9-10. Usually bring a girl home once a week to my dads second house that I chill in.

62392353
Forgot to add, I also lift. Looking pretty fukin good rn. Just hit a 235 bench for reps.

62392357
>>62392315
you sound like a fag maybe try eating dick

62392362
>>62392357
I slay pussy you fucking virgin neckbeard, keep buying your loser crypto coins while I stack assets and smash pussy. Fag.

62392366
>>62392320
Boomer ass reference

62392370
>>62392353
Whoa. People should just fall at your feet. Crazy stuff anon.

62392371
>>62392362
You sound like an underage incel who has never touched a boob in his life, no need to lie on the internet.
Your father should have beaten your ass more while you were still a kid.

62392372
>>62392371
Put my fries in the bag you mcwagie loser.

62392375
>>62392372
You are the wagie here, dweeb. Do keep posting this pasta though, it’s pretty funny.

62393156
>>62392315
Stop reposting this shit, you fucking autist.

62393167
>>62392315
Did you just waste the money and not invest?

62393168
>>62392320
My dad, he owns this dealership

62393174
>>62392366
We've had this thread like twice before and OP is always whining.

62393199
>>62392315
Just quit bro. Fuck your dad. Sell privileged info to the competition. Ask for 30k a month. You could literally triple your life style

item.title: KEK tradies are just as fucked by AI as white-collar fags. — 15 replies — 60.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
KEK tradies are just as fucked by AI as white-collar fags.

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-06-21 16:24 UTC

OP

KEK tradies are just as fucked by AI as white-collar fags. Anthropic found a cheat code to dramatically accelerate robotics using LLMs.

https://www.anthropic.com/research/project-fetch-phase-two

Early replies (first 3)

62392639
So if we're all fucked, what's the endgoal?

62392654
>>62392639
Look what happened to horses

62392668
>>62392639
Cull

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62392674
This assumes the people who own plumbing companies can asked to replace their employees with a robot
It also assumes old lady Mary would be comfortable hiring a robot instead of handy man John she’s know for 15yrs
It also forget a person would need to monitor, deploy, and retrieve it

Pro-tip: never be as replaceable as the people who assume they’re already replaced

62392705
>>62392533
no you don't understand. you need to be a 200 IQ genius to pull wire through a conduit or read a wire ampacity chart.

62392709
>>62392639
UBI and jobs with direct personal contact - massages, physio therapy, hair dressers

and also stuff like day cares, taking care of kids teenagers and the elderly

62392723
>>62392533
And where are these Robots replacing trades right now anon? Yeah that's what I thought.

62392725
>>62392674
let's reconcile this analogy against what we can observe.
>This assumes the people who own landscaping companies can [be] asked to replace their white US citizen employees with illegal shit skins from central America.

62392735
>>62392725
Ah, sorry about my typo. I meant AFFORD.
Your point adds to mine even more now, i forgot about dirt cheap immigrant labor which will definitely be cheaper than robots

62392742
>>62392723
Based

62392743
>>62392674
These kind of jobs wont get replaced any time soon even if we have a leap in robotics, its too dynamic

Factory workers with repetitive work? Lol

62392759
>>62392533
> We report results from Claude Opus 4.7 because it was our most advanced non-Mythos-class model at the time we ran this experiment. Preliminary trials with Claude Mythos Preview showed that it would not provide an apples-to-apples comparison with other models because of how we had set up the experiment and how the model was served.

They tried with mythos and it didn’t work lmao.


>>62392709
Why would they keep 300 million people alive to do a maximum of 50,000 jobs?

62393158
>>62392533
The New World Order isn't merely after genocide this turn. This is
>extinction

62393177
>>62392533
they were already fucked if white collar fags were fucked. If all white collar jobs go away, the white collar fags will have to become blue collar fags. Over saturation will lead to tumbling wages for blue collar fags and then robotics comes along to fuck us all like the fags we are. We're all fags now

62393221
>>62392533
>Saaar buy the illiquid vc antrophic/mythos/spaces shares benchod!
Nope

item.title: should I open a Roth IRA or just keep buying voo with my personal brokerage account? — 11 replies — 30.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
should I open a Roth IRA or just keep buying voo with my personal brokerage account?

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-06-21 16:04 UTC

OP

should I open a Roth IRA or just keep buying voo with my personal brokerage account?

Early replies (first 3)

62392790
>>62392778
You should absolutely use some kind of retirement account to avoid the immediate tax burden. I’m personally a big fan of Roths as I believe US taxes as a percentage of income are the lowest they’re ever gonna get and locking in some post-tax earnings at the current heavily discounted rate is a no brainer.

62392806
>>62392790
Just wait until you're 60 for your life to begin lmao. Never mind that the brain starts degrading at 50. Put it all in a brokerage, that way you can at least realize the gains in your prime years if you want to.

62392927
>>62392790
Roth doesn't avoid the immediate tax burden.
Brokerage accounts are subject to capital gains taxes, but the lowest tax bracket for capital gains in the US is 0% tax up to $98k per year (which is adjusted for inflation each year). And unlike with the Roth, there are no restrictions on withdrawing money from a brokerage account.
>inb4 muh SEPP 72(t)
Will pay your monthly bills, but won't help you with a vacation or a new car or the down payment on a house. And that brokerage account will also pay your monthly bills tax-free as long as you keep it under $98k/yr.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62392931
>>62392927
Also that $98k is gains, if you sell a stock that has tripled in value since you bought it, your gain is only 75% of the selling price, so you could withdraw $122k/year without paying taxes.

62392964
>>62392778
401k Advisor Anon here-
Great question! It depends on how much money you are planning to invest and what your time horizon is.
The annual contribution limit for a Roth IRA in 2026 is $7500. Anything you plan to invest this year beyond that amount will have to be in your personal brokerage account.
If you don’t think you’ll need to withdraw funds before retirement, a Roth IRA is the way to go. However, you can tap into a Roth IRA early if necessary. The principal (which is a post tax contribution) can be withdrawn at anytime without tax or penalty. But the real benefit comes if you’re willing to wait. As long as the account is held for at least 5 years, and withdrawn after age 59 1/2, then the capital gains are also tax exempt. If you’re in your 20s or 30s now, this is a monumental advantage. 30-40 years of gains in the market can be exponential.

62393013
>>62392964
>ChatGPT enters the thread

62393017
>>62392790
Correct.
>>62392806
Roth IRA contribution max is only $7500 a year. If that's all you have to invest you were never going to make it anyways. Max out your Roth and invest the rest in a brokerage account.

62393084
>>62393017
>If that's all you have to invest you were never going to make it anyways
I take it you don't know about Peter Thiel's $28B Roth account?

62393169
>>62393013
I’ll take that as a compliment. And don’t forget to invest in your retirement early! Time is your advantage! You don’t want to be a broke ass bitch working at the grocery store in your 60s.

62393176
>>62392778
If youre not margin maxing there is little downside to using roth since you can always pull your contributions. If you have to backdoor roth, its a 5 year timer for no penalty.

62393182
>>62392778
Open a roth ira via a brokerage (robinhood, webull, schwab, fidelity, idgaf) and invest 7500 per year into that.

item.title: Crypto-Hopium — 4 replies — 16.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Crypto-Hopium

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-06-21 16:18 UTC

OP

>The CLARITY Act is about to be signed.
US corporations will begin buying large quantities of Bitcoin and altcoins.
>The US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve will accumulate 5% of the total supply using a rebalanced Strategic Gold Reserve as collateral.
Trump is about to audit Fort Knox, and ARMA is being drafted to prevent future presidents from selling for a minimum of 20 years.
>The housing market has introduced cryptocurrency backed mortgages.
Participants will hold their cryptocurrencies for 15 and 30 year terms.

Early replies (first 3)

62393159
>The CLARITY Act is about to be signed

really nigga? I thought this shit was dead for this year

62393165
>>62393089
Clarity Act isn't going through. It's completely stalled in negotiations and they've got a week to get something like 10 dems to cross lines.

62393203
>>62393165
According to whom?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62393204
>>62393089
Funny how you niggers always desperately need a meme date/event/regulation/narrative, this board is 99% indians who cannot think for themselves.

item.title: 4th of July 2026, CLARITY ACT — 6 replies — 12.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
4th of July 2026, CLARITY ACT

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-06-21 15:58 UTC

OP

4th of July 2026, CLARITY ACT

Early replies (first 3)

62392772
>>62392755
Explain!

62392786
>>62392755
Those dubs are cool and all, but what about the price of Chainlink token?

62392796
>>62392755
4th of july is a saturday and a holiday, the senate wont be working that day.

this thread has now been deboonked

next!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62392804
>>62392755
No chance of it passing. They've called an emergency sitting as they've made zero headway on the ethics issue despite the time.

62392878
>>62392796
The Senate will pass it before, and Trump will sign it on the 4th, Sweaty.

62393163
>>62392878
sorry. this thread has already been deboonked. you'll have to try again in 2 more weeks. have a happy fathers day

item.title: Canadian Mortgages are insane — 107 replies — 100.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Canadian Mortgages are insane

Open thread • Replies: 107 • Updated: 2026-06-21 15:22 UTC

OP

Anyone that bought homes over the last 10 years has no concept of the magnitude of the level of debt they have.

Imagine 400k to 900k mortgages on cookie cutter homes with no space between them. This is just fine in the mind of the average leaf.

Let me be clear, they are never going to pay it off. Never. They think because everyone else has a big ass mortgage that its fine. It took me 17 years just to pay down my 228k mortgage to 68k where it is now. How the fuck do these people think at 38 with a 500k mortgage they can pay it down by the time they retire? LMAO.

Fucking totally disconnected from reality. Millions of us.

Early replies (first 3)

62382768
im sick of this being a thing, just fucking crash already. I have to deal with crashes 100 times a year as a crypto cuck but everyone else in the world with their houses and their gay stocks is just driving off into the sunset. make it make sense nigger

62382788
>>62382765
their retirement plan is your pic

62382793
>>62382788
I find this pick really depressing because it reminds me of my parents. They are just in another fucking world. You cannot convince them that anything is wrong.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62390626
i gambled my money all in on some tsx venture pennyscam (basically our pink sheets exchange) and got to CAD$600K and i still dont feel like i can buy a house

renting right now for cad$2.25k a month lol for measly 600sq ft

62390793
canadian mortgages suck its true
im super glad mine is only like $100k
i pay less per month for acreage and outbuildings than i could rent a basement nearby
but i dont know how these people who got psyopped into $400k+ 500sqft condos a few years ago are coping lmao

62390860
Small town BC here, more nogs and jeets are getting dumped on us all the time. It's a nice town right now but the writing is on the wall and I'm stuck in my house because I bought before COVID.

62390898
>>62390793
more like $900k for 500 sq ft

i know osmeone who bought a shoebox by the lakefront for that much, then add in realtor fees
they paid almost $50k in closing costs as the BUYER because theyre so retarded i think they paid the commission for the seller lmao

62390903
>>62390452
The thing is that in your 25 year span of paying this debt, some mishap, aka life, is going to happen to you or your family and you haven't even bothered to factor that in. You will never regret paying off your mortgage early on your principal residence.

62390918
>>62390903
the point is you are losing money paying off your mortgage if your rates are locked below inflation...

62390937
>>62390898
oh my god what a nightmare
does he actually live in it or did he think it would make him rich?
>>62390918
read the room
canadian mortgage rates dont lock

62390940
>>62384294
that's like saying there's a lot of gold sitting in the bank, does no one want a bunch of gold?
you are one step from communism, my friend. keep those pods handy, you will need them when the revolution comes

62390941
>>62390918
Gains against inflation are speculative. The interest expense loss is real. I get the argument and it is mathematically sound, but you will find your behaviors will change when you are not making payments to some kike loan holder. Once your house is payed off your net worth just explodes.

62390948
>>62390937
>canadian mortgage rates dont lock
Yeah their housing market is nuts. Huge barriers to new development, massive foreign capital just holding empty real estate, no tax deductions for mortgage interest, no fixed rate loans. The average Canadian is really taking it in the ass from their government.

62390965
Just live inna swamp

62390996
>>62390860
I live across the border in the states from you, when I come up I'm shocked at how many jeets I see in the small towns.

62391181
>>62390071
The developments in Oklahoma and Texas look exactly like this. Except fewer trees.

62391530
>>62390071
I agree, they're a blight. Thankfully it's easy to fix. Super wide roads can have planters running down the centre or the sides to offer shade from flora. Those snout nosed houses won't even exist after subterranean garages are normalized. Buying an average house right now is not a great 'investment'.


>>62390456
it's not any worse than silica which is present in concrete anyways. PPE and demolition regulations would barely need to be updated, if at all. They've literally done human studies where people, actual humans, inhale graphene nanoparticles, so the actual graphene isn't toxic. Yeah the forms of it can be toxic like how asbestos is jagged and harms lungs that way, but, like I said, so is silica. You don't cut up and demolish concrete without precautions and you don't handle dry concrete mix without PPE, so it's a moot issue you are glibly responding about.

>>62390384
both the hate speech and data access law are requirements for Canada's prosperity because the wretched portion of Canadian social capital is too prevalent. Part of the process will involve mass arrests and trials for people posting hate propaganda and advocating for repression based on identity. Secondly, the people leaving aren't patriots and it's actual better to shed these rootless normgroids. They're selling the bottom.

62391534
>>62391530
shade given by flora* not shade from

62391724
all the shitty pandemic deal failed flips for sale around me at a loss are giving me schadenfreude rn

62391758
I vacation enough in Leafland I've considered buying a second home there. The USD is somehow magically not also worthless so that helps. I haven't pulled the trigger because flying there is a massive pain in the ass from where I live in Muttland (no direct flights to Montreal within 3 hours of me) I wouldn't want to use it much.

62391804
>>62391758
We need to import more french speaking africans to fix that problem

62391805
>>62382765
How much is that in a currency anybody gives a fuck about?

62391940
>>62391530
>both the hate speech and data access law are requirements for Canada's prosperity because the wretched portion of Canadian social capital is too prevalent. Part of the process will involve mass arrests and trials for people posting hate propaganda and advocating for repression based on identity

62391957
>>62390941
No. You are retarded if you think this makes sense. If you have a fixed interest rate that is lower than other rates, then you are a complete retard good goy if you pay it off early. This is because then the bank can lend the money out at the current higher rate.

62392304
>>62382765
I've chosen not to participate in this system. I am not going to buy some boomers bags or overpay for some new shitbox paper house made by jeets. I am just going to stack money in my TFSA.

62392458
Only Rob Ford can save Canada at this point

62392536
>>62390384
this.

All the wealthy people I know already sold most if not all of their real estate and moved either to Mexico or overseas. Very few young people I know have much of anything going on and everyone wants to leave.

62392571
>>62390626
What did you invest in?

62392684
>>62382793
While it's depressing I don't blame them. They lived one of the most economically successful high-trust countries in the world for the majority of their lives and it all fell apart in 20 years. They're still living comfortably and are old as fuck and set in their habits so haven't had any sort of major wake up call. Perfect scapegoat for the internationals who really thrashed us into this situation.

62392687
>>62382765
They’ll just do a reverse mortgage to pay for their mortgage when they retire

62392915
>>62391530
Why would anyone be a patriot to an economic zone? Canada is a resource extraction pit that is replacing its own populace. Also lmao at justifying bill c9 and c22.
I am of the belief the liberal party of Canada has damage control personnel desperately trying to correct the record online. Your entire post has a synthetic feel to it

62392972
In Canada, you are staff or owner.

62393083
>>62392684
>>62382793
its just willful ignorance.
The easiest way to deal with bad news is pretend they aint real - problem solved.
Most peoples main priority is not risking their own ass for change so they rather lie themself into everything is fine.

item.title: Post your IQ and salary >100 >120k — 89 replies — 46.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Post your IQ and salary >100 >120k

Open thread • Replies: 89 • Updated: 2026-06-21 14:32 UTC

OP

Post your IQ and salary
>100
>120k

Early replies (first 3)

62391239
>>62391236
135
Currently on gibs, 600 a month

62391240
>>62391236
i dont know my IQ but i assume its just above legally retarded

62391242
>>62391236
We used to joke about data scraping but now I think it might be actually happening.
I see a thread like this once every 5 days.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62392001
>>62391527
> mfw anon thinks he's special for realizing the internet isn't private

congrats on the data entry job though

62392009
>>62391236
>98
>15.6k

62392020
120
300k. Automotive finance manager

62392183
If we're all 120-140 IQ then why is this board so retarded?

62392188
>>62391236
132
Starting a job monday that pays ~90k

62392189
>>62391236
86
12k

62392199
>>62392183
>If we're all 120-140 IQ
yeah, so about that anon...

62392201
>>62392183
You wouldn’t understand.

62392248
140
$0

62392289
>>62391635
I supervise tradies in niche roles (with OT). Stuff like nondestructive testing.

62392303
>100-110
>116k

62392309
>>62392183
You wouldn’t understand.

62392675
>>62391236
>130-135
>$0

62392677
>>62391236
How am I supposed to know my IQ? The real test costs hundreds of dollars

62392741
>>62392675
Smart enough to understand whats wrong not smart enough to fix it.. time consuming SPIRALS OF THOUGHTS.. do you also have the intrusive thoughts of "no one lacks the capacity to think like me" and then you meet them!

62392744
>>62391236
IQ of over 150 (idk apparently my LSAT score is more than sufficient for the three sigma society)
Salary of $185k in a comfy political position I don't need, income of $2.4 MM because I sold some crypto

62392752
105
0
0

62392758
>>62392183
im officially tested 145 because i got worried about brain damage from a crash,
im still only 95-99% correct on my university math tests, the horrible truth is perhaps not that 145 is high but that 145 is still defect which means 100 is a certified idiot. Among billions of people there is likely less than a million with a fully functional brain

62392763
>257 IQ
>9,000,000 USD salary
>Head bussy inspector at Ralph Lauren

Now show me that hole….

62392768
>102
>65k

62392769
>>62391527
If I could press a button to give you lengthy and excruciating physical and emotional suffering, I would press the button. I would tie you in a stress position and shoot you in the back of the head.

62392805
>>62391310
>”I don’t know my IQ it’s probably really low because I’m brown.”
>”I’m on NEET bux because again, I’m brown.”

62392888
>>62391236

I make 250k

62392891
>>62391236

>20/hr

62392921
>>62391236

62392933
200

62392965
>>62391236
>132
>10M IDR (560.97 USD) per month

62392969

item.title: UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1 — 99 replies — 9.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1

Open thread • Replies: 99 • Updated: 2026-06-21 05:56 UTC

OP

Brothers,

SpaceX has begun to rise. Its success or fall is of little importance to us in the short term.

In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.

I for one propose we spend our time learning a subject. Knowledge is the greatest wealth of all.

However, I would be remiss to not tell the truth that I haven't a clue what we should study.

So instead I suggest we create an eggregore for these threads. Others made monero-chan, bobo and sminem

I am thinking we create one based on a girl who would be willing to believe in us while we are poor and brave the pain throughout having to witness our more disappointing moments of action. Never losing faith in us, she is always there. Yes. This is how we shall spend our time.

At any rate, that is my suggestion for tonight's fun. I have to work in the morning so let's not get too rowdy. Take it or leave it. If you will take it, then be sure to double it and pass it on to the next anon.

Let us commence the general!

Come one, come all!

Early replies (first 3)

62373772
>>62373752
Jannies will surely delete these threads. Instead of creating an eggregore why not try something new and usurp an old one. It may be a derivative of one which has already been made.

62373798
>>62373772
Hello anon thanks for joining. You are poster #1. Your anime image shall be the eggregore. The "coffee" in the image is rather a good omen. We all know images with hot girls accompanied by a brief post on coffee attracts all the attention.

Now that matter is settled, help me add some links to this post here. This will be the header for the start of each general

Helpful links

>Educational materials
https://w9.kaijimanga.com/

>Looking to try the TCG route?
https://youtube.com/@alphainvestments69?si=tDAPjnRSZhyCIGP5

>Lost all hope?
https://www.indeed.com/


>Hidden in plain sight
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Limitless_(film)

>Games to strengthen you financial acumen
https://mahjongsoul.yo-star.com/

>Learn your from your betters
https://ia600609.us.archive.org/3/items/the-house-of-rothschild-ferguson-niall/The%20House%20of%20Rothschild%20-%20Ferguson%2C%20Niall.pdf
What is the name of that character in your post?

62373799
>>62373772
verily, a true fact

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62385716
>>62385391
>Would you like to join a group of /biz/tards who also took a liking to drawing as a hobby?
Sure

62385756
>>62385716
https://archive.4plebs.org/pol/thread/528268175/#528271334

Two links are in the archive one is for shitposting and the other is more art related it's the only way to share them here.

62385759
>>62383107
Ok, so you said it’s settled. What is the decision? Btw if your current mascot doesnt work out I nominate that we use anime Elizabeth Holmes as our mascot. Plus she better exemplifies us anyways.

62385818
34 with 8k to my name
Should I just give up? Honest question

62386248
I have a negative NW of $45k at 31. Unemployed. I don’t know how it all went so wrong for me. I don’t know how to fix it. I have a degree but it doesn’t do shit for me. Worst part is that I had almost $300k 4 years ago lmao.

62386520
>>62386248
How did that happen

62386827
>>62385759
Call me strange but I prefer looking at the real thing.

That being said we'll stick to the two most posted anime girls for the mascot.

62386828
>>62386827
>>62385759

62387408
>>62385259
Just hodl, I also have 4 shares but I also have a nw in 6 figures mainly in index fund and cash interest accounts, I treat it as a mid term to long term gamble. It may be massively overvalued but markets can go full retard for the stupidest of reasons. Just remember to take initial out with some profits if it does.

62388072
>>62377867
Kill yourself kaeru, you fucking faggot

62389791
Bump

Are we ready?

62389824
>>62389791
What were we doing again? I'm still trying to group together drawfags.

62390266
>>62381797
would if someone would give me one
and even if i had one most of them give half the money to rent and another quarter to other expenses

62391680
i have saved up exactly 9k dolla
i make 50k a year
and i save/invest 66% of my salary
im mid 26

will i make it?

62392192
We'll tackle it in three's

These generals will undoubtedly attract enough attention to sustain it through the days but likely not enough to bump it off the catalog within a days time.

That being said, we'll choose three different Topics. That way we cover more ground, can reach a wider amount of anons and still have a small amount of topics to focus on.

So let's go with that for topic #1

62392203
For this subject, we'll naturally be investing into and researching various different companies. Photonics is a broad field. We have to narrow down and leave no stone unturned. We'll need to find the major players in the game, the future of the industry, and how it connects with the rest of the globalized sectors.

Furthermore, I will remind you. We will keep up with these topics for 90 days. We will then decide on something new(or perhaps continue if a breakthrough seemed close)

Starting tomorrow. I also ask that you refrain from masturbating. A 90 day nofap isn't much when you're past 19, however if we all combine our psychic/wishes/dreams/aspirations/desires/vril/chi/bloodline astral roads then we can unironically combine that entire nofap and share our semen through the collective unconscious and transmute our desire.

Photonics(The science and technology of generating, controlling, and manipulating light (photons).

How appropriate, let us leave the darkness and come into the light.

62392208
For the next topic...

62392211
eh, you don't need tips
just get MU leaps for 10k
it will turn to 50k+

62392213
I'll help bump from now on, I'm mostly in the background at the moment waiting for the right opportunity to onboard people.

62392239
>>62392213
Yeah eggregore anon, you did well. Honestly. Real well. Of all the first posts that could've been in my thread, I'm happy it was you. I wanted to talk about your draw idea. I have been thinking about it. I really have.

It hurts me to say this. I really am having reservations with it. I'll explain my reasoning.

It's too grand. It REALLY begs a lot from the average anon and the amount of anons who will likely frequent this general. Maybe one day this general takes off but right now it's still in the infancy stages. Let's take the photonics option as an example. To ask an anon to read an article and shill a stock here on photonics is a small ask.

To ask them to draw. Something that not even the 4chan board /ic/ is capable of doing, is a lot. That board is NOTORIOUS for the disparity of skill with its participants. If the K shaped economy was a board, that would be it.

/o/, most white men know how to fix cars, can afford a car and like fixing cars. Even if they have different quality of cars, they still all get under the hood

/diy/, while the wealth level does indeed vary, the amount of individuals who know how to plant, build, repair are all there. The subject matter for these two boards seems to repel idle minds who just nitpick other people's work. Even if you thought that mans house looks like shit, you inherently know that that man built a HOUSE

Same with /g/ where an extensive amount of people know how to program. Either due to school, work or just love for the hobby.

/ic/? All you need is a pencil or at the very least $100-$200 worth of supplies. Yet they all crab(ironic) on each other and they all know at the end of the day, it's just art. The other boards I mentioned have skills most people are forced to learn. Drawing isn't that skill.

I have one more post to say on this, give me 10 minutes before you respond

62392256
>>62374086
Seven figure net worth my life is fundamentally the same as when it was six or even five figures.

Aim for enough you're not stressing about $ don't do anything retarded and just live your life.

62392261
>>62392213
Another thing is that we want to leverage the amount of anons who will frequent these threads, and likely spend a limited time (emphasis on limited) and will only be able to make 4-5 posts before heading out.

Compare that to the amount of /ic/ anons you want to gather? A number of 10-15 draw anons is poor compared to the 50-60 unique anons who might post more on our topics of study and likely can push our plan further along

Drawing takes time and a lot of energy. We're just trying to get above $10k. If we had these /ic/ anons in here at best we'd have 4-5(AT BEST) working and 50-60 anons only able to really focus on 2/3 of the topics because one topic is gate kept for drawfags

Anon. If you want to make your own threads and own path, then go for it. I can't reasonably see it doing well here.

Finally, is the time. We've got 90 days before we switch topics. That time factor is important. We have to adapt. We can't waste a year dedicated to shrimp farming. 90 days. We have to move fast, the great reset is upon us. Drawing is antithetical to that 90 day margin.

I said what I mainly want to say. Don't feel the need to be polite. If you feel passionate about this and have to respond like a chansman then do that. I believe your plan could be done, just perhaps in another space. Not mine.

Thank you for showing me Gabriel Tenma

62392264
>>62392239
You could have picked anything other than drawing, even coding or vibe coding shit. Drawing has a horrible ROI unless you are a savant.

62392267
>>62392261
One of our topics has been chosen.

Let us take a moment to soak this in before I discuss the second. I am quite skilled in it, and I believe many of you are as well. I alluded to it briefly earlier.

62392272
>>62392264
Yes, that is a point I wanted to emphasize as well

62392301
Drawing does take a lot of time and it is true that the ROI is practically non-existent which explains the endless seethe coming from /ic/ kek. The exceptional ones are those who managed to fool enough people into subscribing to their blogs through a paywall, they shill themselves very much like a shitcoin. That's what I'm trying to put together, art and the whole shitcoin element that involves the concept of "working for your bags" for an ROI after tokenizing a narrative, a meme, and in this case a hobby.

Pic related is a good example, someone liked this enough to steal it and started to use this drawing to shill their own shitcoin with a couple years ago.

62392302
>>62385259
It dipped because of the Cursor acquisition, but it'll likely go back up.
Starfall demo is on Tuesday, and Starship flight 13 may fly as early as July.

62392310
>>62392301
and by stealing I mean that in a good way since that's what we do anyway we go around stealing content from others and recreate it into something of our own.

62392312
I know I'm technically not part of this club but I'm desperate for answers anyways.
> 34
> $30k net worth
That net worth was once $150k but crypto absolutely bludgeoned me and wiped me out + living expenses ate up a solid $30k-$50k of that over the past several years.

Desperate for answers because I've been unemployed for a few years, yeah CS meme degree if any of you are wondering. I've applied to around 400 jobs since late last year but only a few measly phone screens and no actual interviews yet. Endless rejections and I'm at the end of my rope. What type of jobs will allow me to career pivot? It seems impossible to pivot these days when every hiring manager wants 2-5 years of (proven) niche experience. That and fuck ass HR uses AI to screen candidates at literally every company these days, it's fucking impossible to get noticed in front of literally hundreds of applicants per job.

62392373
>>62392301
>>62392310
You'll have to do remain in the background anon, do what you must with this real estate, I'm gonna move on with the main 3

item.title: Automated my trading with an on-chain scraper. Best choice ever. — 10 replies — 9.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Automated my trading with an on-chain scraper. Best choice ever.

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-06-21 15:21 UTC

OP

> Be me
> Got tired of missing microcap pumps because I was sleeping or working
> Coded a custom bot that scrapes insider whale wallets and alpha sources in real-time
> It fed me this alert earlier today (check the image)
> Already up 3x on this trade while doing literally nothing

Testing the server limits right now. If you want to check the raw feed before I make it private or monetize it, look up CryptoHunterEn on TG.

Just search: CryptoHunterEn
(Don't post direct links here, they get filtered).

Not selling anything, just sharing the data pipeline for a few hours. WAGMI.

Early replies (first 3)

62392615
>>62392609

62392630
>>62392609
this created mustard gas don't do it

62392667
>>62392609
dont listen to this guy, use my app instead, just search PumpDumperEn so i can pump and dump you

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62392685
>>62392609
If it works flawless why would you want people to use it and not keep to yourself?

62392906
Because I'm testing server stress load limits with API webhooks before deploying the full infrastructure on a private VPS. More users hitting the bot data feed simultaneously helps me benchmark latency.

Also, liquidity. Some microcap alerts require more volume than what my single wallet can deploy to actually trigger the breakout properly. I lose nothing by letting a few anons front-run the block data with me. Don't use it if you don't want to, it's going private in a few days anyway.

62392923
For me, its Profit Trailer with the PT Magic addon

Stop Trading Blind. Start Trading Smart.
The crypto market never sleeps — and neither should your strategy. That's where Profit Trailer and PT Magic come in.
Profit Trailer is a battle-tested automated crypto trading bot that works 24/7 on your exchange, executing buy, sell, and DCA strategies so you don't have to. It handles the grind while you live your life.
But here's where it gets powerful.
PT Magic takes Profit Trailer to a whole new level.
PT Magic analyzes price trends across your trading pairs and automatically updates your bot's settings to match current market conditions
— in real time. Forget switching manually between bear and bull settings.
While Profit Trailer on its own can switch between basic "Bear," "Bull," and "Normal" modes, PT Magic lets you define an unlimited number of nuanced market conditions
— think "Tanking," "IncomingBull," "SidewaysDown," "SuperBull," and more — each with its own tailored strategy.
What does that mean for you?
Your bot adapts automatically as the market shifts, not hours after the fact

Individual coin settings adjust based on each coin's own performance, protecting you from poorly performing assets while capitalizing on the ones running hot

A complete dashboard gives you live market conditions, a full sales history, dynamic projections, a bag analyzer, and a DCA calculator — all in one place

You can even export all buy and sell data as an Excel file, critical for anyone tracking gains for tax purposes

PT Magic is completely free
— it's a community-built addon with no additional cost on top of your Profit Trailer license
The bottom line: Profit Trailer executes your trades. PT Magic makes sure those trades are always calibrated to what the market is actually doing right now.
If you're serious about automated crypto trading, running Profit Trailer without PT Magic is leaving money on the table.
Set it up once. Let it adapt forever.

62392948
Where are the micro cap coins? The channel is just market updates and long/short calls.

62393003
thread smells like spicy shit

62393006
>>62392948
lighter, ticker LIT

62393078
Volume is low today, I'm not forcing artificial alerts on dead microcaps just to dump on you. Scraper only triggers when actual whale insider wallets move funds. Check the pinned messages or wait for the next volatility spike.

item.title: Does picrel actually happen in usa? Some lower class uneducated person goes join the military and now becomes an unwante… — 78 replies — 9.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Does picrel actually happen in usa? Some lower class uneducated person goes join the military and now becomes an unwante…

Open thread • Replies: 78 • Updated: 2026-06-21 07:55 UTC

OP

Does picrel actually happen in usa?

Some lower class uneducated person goes join the military and now becomes an unwanted bacteria?

>lives life to the fullest
Yeah..as part of the underclass

What /biz/ related things can the economy do to stop VA?

Early replies (first 3)

62389201
>>62389196
Are you talking about investing in education?

62389205
>>62389201
I meant removal of those are a net negative fiscal impack.

62389231
Hello, I know you post here.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62389526
>>62389524
You're retarded. A far worse fate.

62389531
>>62389526
I rather be retard than a humiliatary cuck.

62389536
>>62389519
>parents basement
You need to go back, faggot.

62389542
>>62389536
That is a poor person ahh insult.
Like it projects that “moms basement” is ugly and uncomfy and poor.

62389547
>>62389526
You’re a humilitary cuck talking shit. Know your place.

62389642
>>62389196
I thought Trump got rid of these

62390044
>>62389240
if only the retards making rage bait threads on 4chan would feel the same sense of inadequacy, but sadly they are immune

62390051
>>62390044
What rage bait?

62390066
>>62389205
It will come as a part of the goverment being faced with harsh reality, all benefits get cut out of necessity or alternatively the inflation rises faster than benefits.

62390098
>>62390066
What benefits?
Doge already pulled out lots of these benefits. Eventually, the government just needs these people to starve.

62390314
>>62389196
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62390448
>>62389409
>There clearly aren’t even that many veterans
Bruh like 2% of the population pulls DoD paychecks actively, there are a ton of veterans.

62390734
>>62390448
Veterans are low iq like blue collar.

62390956
>>62389386
>>62389391
>>62389196
There is no such thing as a class you communist jew. Bashing the usa military is always good tho.

62390961
>>62390734
>good that I, a fat 40 year old terminally online 4chan poster, am smart

62391311
>>62390956
Working class…and non working class. You BUMB fuckface.

62391698
>>62391311
Doesnt exist, made up definitions. There is no "class" you switch when you lose a job or get a job, etc

62391720
>>62389542

Holy shit, this parasite actually lives in his mommy's basement. Major izzat loss

62391786
>>62389196
It's just VA fraud, with how pay and benefits are structured It's the only thing that keeps the branches staffed.

If you want to reform it you'll need to give a massive incentive package because it sucks ass otherwise.

62391810
>>62391698
Broo what?!
I have heard leftists say this before.
>>62391720
That’s not how this work. Some families don’t need to work.

62391813
>>62391786
Interesting, so that redditor is a scum we need to get rid of.

62391818
>>62389196
You spam this shit non-stop you fucking nutcase. You're the same guy who spammed about wanting VA benefits after cutting himself in the military. You're bitter and retarded because apparently you can't even apply for any disability. Stop spamming this stupid faggot shit every week. VA disability will never go away. The US will always need zogbots and it's a drop in the bucket, we are 40 trillion dollars in debt. Kill yourself you useless, mentally ill faggot.

62391845
>>62389196
24 posts by this ID about "lower class" = OCPD namenigger thread. this mentally ill discord tranny posts 12+ hours a day.

62391847
>>62391818
>>62391845
Meds.

62391970
>>62390314
Every fucking thread. Don't you have a life you gay homo faggot?

62391977
>>62389196
ZogBots should be euthanized when decommissioned.

62392030
>>62389240
Yeah, veterans on disability for no reason other than GIBS or ‘mental health’ issues are nothing more than leeches. It’s good that some recognize it as a failing.

62392305
>>62389232
i remember meeting some loser on Rust who played it 12 hours a day and was on full VA disability. What a life

62392311
>>62392305
Well, people that enter military are usually subhuman tier types.

62392475
Poorfags, the minute AI lets us take the economy out of your hands 100% and you have no leverage, we do not plan to keep paying your leech lifestyle. Enjoy the theft while you can, I guess.

item.title: There are people in USA who make $51k a year on welfare and live in low cost states and like to larp as middle class. — 41 replies — 9.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
There are people in USA who make $51k a year on welfare and live in low cost states and like to larp as middle class.

Open thread • Replies: 41 • Updated: 2026-06-21 11:52 UTC

OP

There are people in USA who make $51k a year on welfare and live in low cost states and like to larp as middle class.

When did everyone start caring about class suddenly?

Early replies (first 3)

62389137
People don't care about class enough
The working class isn't united, but the Epstein class certainly is.

62389142
>>62389137
>epstein class
Poor leftist redditor liberal detected
You are not owed a job btw.

62389144
>>62389142
At least regime shills in communist countries get a pittance for the efforts, you do it for free

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62389172
I can feel my brain leaking out of my ears from the banality of all your post topics OP

62389176
>>62389161
No, the ones doing actual valuable work are working class. The cunty dregs trying to tear that work down are definitely not in the same class.

62389177
>>62389172
traffic is down again. OP is posting as much as he can but not driving engagement. Probably because he's an annoying fuckwad.

62389178
>>62389167
>>62389162
Or VA or some nonsense like that.
>>62389161
What squabble?

62389185
>>62389178
yep, VA might do it, but VA disability is paid for by the employee and employer just like civilian disability.

Not welfare. He paid for that.

62389189
>>62389185
What? Picrel.

62389194
>>62389185
>VA disability is paid for by the employee and employer
Are you a bot?

62389199
>>62389189
>>62389194
Your insurance is taken out of your paycheck

this is true whether you're military or civilian. You are paying for health care and disability insurance.

you dumbfucks don't realize half your taxes go to paying for YOUR disability insurance and retirement.

62389202
>>62389199
See picrel

62389226
>>62389202
wait, do you think that pic says he DIDN'T pay for it?

fucking retarded ESL motherfucker you're not even from the US.

62389246
>>62389226
He didn’t pay for it, can you read?

62389257
>>62389246
he didn't say that, you retarded piece of shit

62389667
>>62389162
>Earned Income Credit
>Child tax credit
>100% healthcare subsidies
>Retirement savings credit
>Family Affordability Tax Credit (in my state)
>Utility credits
All of this and more is available if you are married with two kids and make $81k a year or less.
If you own a small business you can also contribute about $44k to a 401k, plus $14k to your IRA, every year tax free and it doesn't count towards your $81k income. The easy credits are worth about $23k a year so your actual income is $104k plus an additional $58k for retirement savings. Total tax burden on all that is around $6k; less if you are ballsy with distributions vs payroll.
Pay off house and cars then coast on minimum work, very little tax and get a bunch of benefits.

62389674
>>62389199
VA disability isn't insurance you fucking tard. How do you suppose a military vet with 4 years of service "paid" into his lifetime 4k a month?

62389679
>>62389129
It is worse than that. Pic related is very dated so it is probably worse now.

62389696
>>62389142
Jews are not owed children to rape.

62389704
>>62389696
Cope.

62389760
>>62389696
Oy vey only a redditor would be anti-semitic in 2026

62389773
>>62389667
none of that is welfare
>>62389674
>How do you suppose a military vet with 4 years of service "paid" into his lifetime 4k a month?
same way any american worker pays for disability insurance. Payroll deductions.

>but how can you pay for the insurance on a $500k house if you only paid in $100 per month?
easy, not everyone's house burns down.

do I really need to explain to you how insurance works? This board is fucking stupid.

62390306
>>62389129
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62392114
>>62389142
It's okay I'll just use my parent's network to land me a job...oh no wait...that's your plan

62392202
I live in a million dollar house and collect food stamps. lol lmao

62392215
>>62392202
Cause the rest of the city increased in value aka the rich pulled it up so all home prices went up.
In major cities, a 1m is ghetto but you knew that.

62392218
>>62392202
king

I have one of the largest social housing residences of the netherlands while on disability

62392328
>>62392218
>social housing

62392526
>>62389679
This is what happens when systems are designed by incompetent politicians willing to sell gibs for votes.

62392535
>>62389129
>When did everyone start caring about class suddenly?
When you stinkjeets brought your caste obsession to America.

62392546
>>62389144
Kek checked and based

62392707
>>62389129
>9 posts by this ID
>all about "class" or "being poor"
hello OCPD discord tranny namenigger. for anyone who doesn't know, this thread was posted by a balding tranny child groomer. he posts 12+ hour a day on biz.

62392722
>>62392707
He also recently admitted to be 40 years ago.
https://warosu.org/biz/thread/62366814#p62367387
I can see him fat, old, dirty and stinking in his room at the pc all day.
